enemy.name: The Headmistress
enemy.special: onEncounterStart: exhausted your 2 highest-mastery cards at encounter start

player.deckNote: 2 strongest cards already exhausted at encounter start

hand.name: Emergency
hand.description: Gain block. Double if HP below 30%.

hand.name: Adapt
hand.description: Smart card: plays as Block if enemy attacks, Cleanse if debuffed, else Attack.

relics.name: Steel Skin
relics.description: Take 2 less damage from all sources (min 1).

notes: Headmistress already burned the player's 2 best cards at encounter start (Detention mechanic). Now charging a 10-dmg hit. Player has mostly defensive options. Steel Skin reduces damage by 2. Does blocking make more sense than trying to push 13 HP? Emergency is weak at full HP. Is Adapt useful here? Low tension — likely just block-and-grind.
